specs.title: should show error on invalid email
should show error on invalid password
should require email and password fields
should log out and return to sign-in state
should maintain session across page reload
should display all primary nav items
should switch tabs on nav click
should collapse/expand sidebar on desktop
should display bottom nav on mobile
should navigate to tabs from mobile nav
should open drawer on hamburger menu
should close drawer on backdrop click
should maintain active tab state across page reload
should not lose nav orientation when viewing drawer-only tabs
should show welcome modal on first visit
should skip first-run modal
should accept valid birth date
should reject invalid birth date
should load and display chart tab content
should display chart profile information
should load and display transit information
should navigate to check-in tab
should allow submitting a check-in entry
should navigate to composite tab
should navigate to practitioner tab
should display client list or workspace
should render session notes UI
should show pricing modal on upgrade button click
should display tier cards with pricing
should toggle billing period (monthly/annual)
should show practitioner pricing modal
should toggle between light and dark theme
should display security settings button when logged in
should show export data button when logged in
should mark required fields as required
should reject invalid email format
should enforce minimum password length
should handle network failures gracefully
should display correctly on small phone
should display desktop layout on tablet
should display full desktop layout
should have ARIA labels on nav items
should have role="button" or proper heading hierarchy
should have readable text on background
complete unauthenticated exploration journey
complete login → navigation → feature interaction flow
complete practitioner mode exploration
complete mobile user journey
